requirements.summary: Display upcoming school activities on homepage with dates, times, and locations
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays a list of activities
Each activity shows date, time, and location
Activities are sorted by date with upcoming events first

file_operations.description: Create homepage component that displays a list of upcoming activities. Query getUpcomingActivities from backend and render activities in a card-based layout showing title, date, time, location, and category. Include hero banner image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png.
Create reusable activity card component that displays activity title, date, time, location, and category with appropriate styling and category color indicators.
Create React Query hook to fetch upcoming activities from backend using getUpcomingActivities method. Handle loading and error states.
Add route for HomePage component at root path. Ensure authentication check is in place before displaying application content.

requirements.summary: Implement activity creation form with all required fields
acceptanceCriteria: Users can access an activity creation form
Form includes all required fields: title, description, date, time, location, category
Activities are saved to the backend
Newly created activities appear in the activity list

file_operations.description: Create activity creation page with form for title, description, date, time, location, and category fields. Use authorization component to ensure only authenticated users can access. Include category icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/category-icons.dim_256x256.png for category selection.
Create reusable form component for activity input with validation. Include date picker, time input, text fields, and category dropdown. Handle form submission and validation errors.
Create React Query mutation hook to create activities using createActivity backend method. Handle success/error states and invalidate activity list query on success.
Add route for CreateActivityPage component. Wire navigation link in main layout/header to allow users to access activity creation.

requirements.summary: Display detailed activity information including organizer and participant count
acceptanceCriteria: Users can click on an activity to view full details
Detail view shows complete activity information
Participant count is displayed and updated

file_operations.description: Create activity detail page that displays full activity information including title, description, date, time, location, category, organizer name, and participant count. Fetch activity using getActivityDetails backend method.
Create React Query hook to fetch activity details by ID using getActivityDetails backend method. Handle loading and error states.
Create React Query hook to fetch user profiles using getUserProfile backend method from authorization component. Use to display organizer name instead of principal ID.
Make activity cards clickable and add navigation to activity detail page when clicked.
Add route for ActivityDetailPage component with activity ID parameter.

requirements.summary: Enable activity registration and display user's registered activities
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register for an activity
Users can view a list of activities they are registered for
Registration status is persisted in the backend
Users cannot register for the same activity twice

file_operations.description: Create page that displays activities the current user has registered for. Fetch user registrations using getUserRegistrations backend method and display registered activities. Use authorization component to ensure only authenticated users can access.
Create React Query mutation hook to register for activities using registerForActivity backend method. Handle success/error states and invalidate relevant queries on success.
Create React Query hook to fetch user's registered activities using getUserRegistrations backend method. Handle loading and error states.
Add registration button to activity detail page. Check if user is already registered and disable button or show registered status. Wire registration mutation to button click.
Add route for MyActivitiesPage component. Wire navigation link in main layout/header to allow users to view their registered activities.

requirements.summary: Add filtering and search for activities by category, date range, and keywords
acceptanceCriteria: Users can filter activities by category
Users can filter activities by date range
Users can search activities by keyword
Filters can be combined
Results update in real-time as filters change

file_operations.description: Create filter component with category dropdown, date range picker, and keyword search input. Manage filter state and emit filter changes to parent component. Reference category icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/category-icons.dim_256x256.png for visual indicators.
Create custom hook to manage filter state and apply filtering logic to activity list. Filter activities client-side by category, date range, and keyword search. Handle combined filters.
Add ActivityFilters component to homepage. Wire filter state to activity list display to show filtered results in real-time.

requirements.summary: Display activities in a monthly calendar grid with category indicators
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar displays activities in a monthly grid
Activities use different colors or icons based on category
Users can click on calendar dates to view activities for that day
Calendar allows navigation between months

file_operations.description: Create calendar view page that displays activities in a monthly grid format. Use category-specific colors and icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/category-icons.dim_256x256.png. Include month navigation controls and handle date click events to show activities for selected day.
Create calendar grid component that renders days of the month with activity indicators. Apply category-specific styling for activities. Handle date selection and month navigation.
Create modal component to display activities for a selected date when user clicks on a calendar day. Show activity list with basic info and link to detail pages.
Create custom hook to organize activities by date for calendar display. Group activities by day and handle month navigation logic.
Add route for CalendarPage component. Wire navigation link in main layout/header to allow users to access calendar view.

requirements.summary: Implement vibrant education-focused theme with warm colors and card-based layout
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design uses a cohesive color palette with warm, energetic tones
Typography is clear, friendly, and appropriate for educational context
Layout uses card-based components for organizing information
Design is consistent across all pages and components

file_operations.description: Configure Tailwind theme with warm, energetic color palette including oranges, greens, and teals. Define category-specific colors for sports, academic, arts, and social. Set up typography scale with friendly, clear fonts.
Add global styles for education-focused theme including base typography, card styles, and color variables. Apply warm color scheme and ensure accessibility with sufficient contrast.

Create main layout component with consistent header, navigation, and content area. Apply theme styling and ensure responsive design. Include hero banner from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png on appropriate pages.
Wrap all routes with Layout component to ensure consistent theme and navigation across all pages.
